Class DialogueAnsweredEvent

java.lang.Object
org.bukkit.event.Event
org.aselstudios.luxdialoguesapi.Events.DialogueAnsweredEvent
public class DialogueAnsweredEvent extends org.bukkit.event.Event
Bukkit event fired when a player selects an answer within a dialogue.

    • DialogueAnsweredEvent

      public DialogueAnsweredEvent(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, Dialogue dialogue, Answer answer)

      Parameters:
      player - player who answered
      dialogue - dialogue being answered
      answer - answer that was chosen
